packs.title: Facilities & Resources
packs.description: Practice booking meeting rooms and facilities

stages.prompt: You need to book a room for your team meeting. Tell your colleague you'll reserve a meeting room.

modelAnswer.kana: かいぎしつをよやくします。
modelAnswer.english: I will reserve a meeting room.

stages.hint: 会議室 (かいぎしつ) — meeting room

stages.prompt: Your team is taking a break. Tell them let's go to the break room.

modelAnswer.japanese: 休憩室に行きましょう。
modelAnswer.kana: きゅうけいしつにいきましょう。
modelAnswer.english: Let's go to the break room.

stages.hint: 休憩室 (きゅうけいしつ) — break room

stages.prompt: You're having lunch at the company cafeteria. Tell your colleague you'll be in the cafeteria.
A client is visiting. Tell them you'll meet them at the entrance.

modelAnswer.japanese: エントランスでお待ちしております。
modelAnswer.kana: エントランスでおまちしております。
modelAnswer.english: I'll be waiting for you at the entrance.

stages.prompt: You need a private room for a sensitive discussion. Ask if there's a private room available.

modelAnswer.japanese: 個室は空いていますか。
modelAnswer.kana: こしつはあいていますか。

stages.prompt: You need to work late tonight. Tell your manager you'll be working overtime.

modelAnswer.kana: きょうはざんぎょうします。

stages.hint: 残業 (ざんぎょう) — overtime work

stages.prompt: You need to travel to Osaka for work next week. Tell your manager you'll go on a business trip.

modelAnswer.japanese: 来週、大阪に出張します。
modelAnswer.kana: らいしゅう、おおさかにしゅっちょうします。
modelAnswer.english: I'll go on a business trip to Osaka next week.

stages.hint: 出張 (しゅっちょう) — business trip

stages.prompt: You're attending mandatory training next month. Tell your manager you'll attend the training.

modelAnswer.japanese: 来月、研修に参加します。
modelAnswer.kana: らいげつ、けんしゅうにさんかします。
modelAnswer.english: I'll attend the training next month.

stages.prompt: You want to take paid leave next Friday. Request to take a day of paid leave.

modelAnswer.japanese: 来週の金曜日に有休を取りたいです。
modelAnswer.kana: らいしゅうのきんようびにゆうきゅうをとりたいです。
modelAnswer.english: I'd like to take paid leave next Friday.

stages.hint: 有休 (ゆうきゅう) — paid leave

stages.prompt: You're working from home tomorrow. Tell your team you'll be remote.

modelAnswer.japanese: 明日は在宅勤務します。
modelAnswer.kana: あしたはざいたくきんむします。
modelAnswer.english: I'll be working from home tomorrow.

stages.hint: 在宅勤務 (ざいたくきんむ) — remote work
